ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the user */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level or category of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's profile */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the user */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the user */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Change in rank since the last update */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking update */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode associated with the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_game_mode FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical ranking entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ranking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's profile */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the user */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the user */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Change in rank since the last update */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "point_reward" INTEGER /* Points rewarded for participating or winning */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., tournament, challenge) */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's profile */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user in the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the user in the event */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics (e.g., kills, wins, time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for earning the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, title, content) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the reward expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rewards" (
  "user_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-reward association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's profile */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "is_expired" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the reward has expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions and responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's profile */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_game_modes" (
  "event_game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-game mode association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game mode */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the game mode is primary for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_game_modes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_game_modes_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)
